items.name: Manager's Golden Vest
items.description: This versatile Vest for Managers in gold is the perfect addition to any professional wardrobe. Crafted from a durable fabric blend such as gold and cotton, this vest exudes confidence and style. Featuring a classic design with a two-button closure, it is perfect for any formal or business casual occasion. The back panel boasts two functional pockets and an interior mesh pocket, allowing you to keep your most important documents and items safely hidden. The adjustable waistband and knit panels ensure a comfortable and flattering fit. Take your professional look to the next level with this stylish and timeless golden Vest for Managers.

items.name: Spring Sakura Soda Cap🌸
items.description: The "Spring Sakura Soda Cap" is a delicately crafted bottle cap adorned with the vibrant imagery of cherry blossoms in full bloom, capturing the essence of springtime. The design features intricate pink petals against a backdrop of soft pastel hues, evoking a sense of renewal and beauty. Made from durable materials, it securely seals carbonated beverages while adding a touch of elegance to any drink. This cap serves as both a functional closure and a decorative element, making it a charming addition to any beverage container during the spring season.

items.name: Valentines Kpop Pink Dress with black gloves
items.description: Rozy is Korea's first digital influencer. Her debut collection was influenced by balloons. Parties are always fun and give happiness to many people, and Rozy wanted to share this positive mindset with her community, choosing Party as the theme.
